title: Plugin title
description: One short paragraph explaining when an operator should use this plugin.

notes: Keep commands as command plus args, not raw shell strings.
Explain the config, environment, or PATH change that enables it.

tokenOptimization.strategy: Explain how this plugin reduces prompt, output, or tool-call tokens.
tokenOptimization.savingsSignal: Explain how an operator can see that token usage improved.
whenToUse: List the workflows where this plugin is useful.
